title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by Claude API and Claude Code, to help sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool was developed by Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager without coding experience, to reduce administrative burden on sales staff.
